user_task_description: Clean the board memorandum draft without changing the live wording.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Remove the visible Draft: prefixes, restore the sections to Executive Summary, Program Snapshot, Board Actions, and Appendix A - Metrics, refresh the table of contents, keep the table values unchanged, and normalize the header and footer.
atomic_scope: Only the bounded document-wide edits and structural changes explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document that completes the requested single-document workflow.

notes.Task Notes: - Preserve unrelated content unless the task explicitly requires a change

required_paragraphs: This memo is ready for board circulation.
The release package is fully prepared.
All core milestones are on track.
No open blockers remain for publication.
Approve the release plan at the next meeting.
